title: Implement Markdown Link Support with Browser and Termux Nano Integration
description: Implement markdown link parsing and click interception in MainActivity.java: 1. Parse markdown links [text](url) into HTML anchors inside renderMarkdown. 2. Enable LinkMovementMethod on message TextViews so links are clickable. 3. Intercept link clicks: if it is a web URL, open it in the browser; if it is a Termux file path, launch nano inside Termux using a foreground com.termux.RUN_COMMAND intent.
